title: RBLX Roblox 3月10號上市 有無人有興趣狗衝?

replies.msg:
美國熱門線上遊戲平台 Roblox 原先預計在去年首次公開發行（IPO），後來宣布延遲計畫。不過，根據最新外電報導指出，Roblox 已敲定今年 3 月掛牌，並改成直接公開發行（DPO），成為 2021 年備受期待的美股上市案。

路透社、《華爾街日報》報導，Roblox 計劃於 3 月 10 日在紐約證交所掛牌上市，交易代號為「RBLX」，並採取「直接上市」（Direct listing）策略，也就是不將股票交給投資銀行承銷，藉此省去承銷費用，且不像傳統 IPO 模式有鎖定期，投資人可以隨時賣股變現，但企業必須承擔股價劇烈波動的風險。

Roblox 同時公布 2020 年全年業績，營收較 2019 年成長 82%，達到 9.239 億美元，但歸屬於普通股股東之淨損為 2.533 億美元，高於 2019 年的 7,100 萬美元；營業現金流（Operating cash flow）從 2019 年的 9,920 萬美元增至 5.24 億美元。

Roblox 原定於去年 12 月進行 IPO，但當時住房共享平台 Airbnb、餐飲外送公司 DoorDash 上市後備受市場追捧，股價瘋狂飆漲，讓 Roblox 決定延後 IPO 計畫，以擬定更適合的 IPO 價格。

據路透社 1 月報導，Roblox 1 月提交的 IPO 文件指出，目標是 2 月完成 IPO，但因美國證券交易委員會（SEC）對財報展開審查，因此必須再次延遲上市。

Roblox 成立於 2004 年，玩家可使用類似樂高積木的磚塊，打造自我風格的虛擬世界。受惠 COVID-19 疫情帶動電玩商機爆發，2020 年，每日活躍使用者人數攀升至近 3,300 萬，遠高於 2019 年的 1,800 萬人。

連燈力主席呂布表示非常有興趣私人重倉RBLX，有玩過明白外國細路課金可以幾變態。

(Adds background on Roblox, direct listings)

By Joshua Franklin and Ankur Banerjee

March 9 (Reuters) - The New York Stock Exchange on Tuesday set a reference price of $45 for shares of U.S. gaming platform Roblox Corp RBLX.N on the eve of its public market debut, implying a market value for the company of around $30 billion.

San Mateo, California-based Roblox is among the world&aposs most popular gaming sites for children and offers a host of games across mobile devices and gaming consoles.

The reference price is not an offering price to purchase shares but rather will be a performance benchmark for when Roblox&aposs stock starts trading on the stock exchange on Wednesday. The opening public price will be determined by buy and sell orders collected by the NYSE from broker-dealers.

Roblox has opted to go public through a direct listing rather than a traditional initial public offering (IPO). This means the company is not selling any shares in advance of its market debut, as is the case with IPOs.

Direct listings are still relatively rare, though they are becoming increasingly popular way to go public amid criticism that investment banks underwriting IPOs underprice shares being sold to help create a first-day trading "pop" for the benefit of their big trading clients.

Reuters reported last week that U.S. grocery delivery app Instacart is considering going public through a direct listing, concerned that it could leave money on the table through an IPO.

Roblox said in January it had raised around $520 million in a new Series H private fundraising round in a deal which valued it at $29.5 billion, more than seven times the $4 billion the company was valued at in its Series G round 11 months earlier.

U.S. demand for video games has surged as consumers seek home entertainment while living under lockdown measures to curb the spread of COVID-19.
